holdings.infoBox: EWUS is an equity ETF with a total of 207 individual holdings. The top holdings are Diploma stock at 2.72%, Beazley at 2.11%, IMI plc at 2.07%, Games Workshop Group at 1.94%, and The Weir Group at 1.87%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI United Kingdom Small Cap ETF (EWUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI United Kingdom Small Cap index, a market-cap-weighted index of small-cap United Kingdom companies. EWUS was launched on Jan 25, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Short-Dated Gilt Yields Edge Lower After BOE Keeps Rates on Hold
data.text: Short-dated gilt yields edged lower after the Bank of England left interest rates unchanged, as widely expected.

data.title: BOE Leaves Rates Unchanged, Signals Caution on Hormuz Opening
data.text: U.K. central bank says it may yet raise rates to tame inflation triggered by closure of the energy bottleneck.

data.title: U.K. Unemployment Falls Below 5%
data.text: The unemployment rate unexpectedly inched down while wage growth remained flat, ahead of a BOE meeting in which it is expected to keep interest rates on hold.

data.title: BOE Expected to Hold Rates as Central Banks React to Iran Peace Hopes
data.text: The Bank of England is widely expected to maintain borrowing costs at 3.75% on Thursday as central banks assess the potential end of the Iran conflict.

data.title: Britain says full import ban on Russian diesel, jet fuel will happen by 2027
data.text: Britain on Friday said that a full ban on ​diesel and jet fuel made ‌in Russia would happen by 2027 as it set out its timeline ​to end a temporary licence ​for Russian oil products.

data.title: BOE Survey Finds Businesses Expect to Raise Prices at Faster Rate
data.text: U.K. businesses polled in May expected to raise their prices at a faster rate, but wage increases were seen slowing, according to a Bank of England survey released Friday.
